heading: Contracts with cooperatives furnishing classers; amount and type of payment
label: 51a–1 Contracts with cooperatives furnishing classers; amount and type of payment
text: On and after , the Secretary may contract with cooperatives furnishing classers and other facilities for classing cotton and may pay for such services an amount, some part of which may be in kind, not in excess of the value of the samples.July 5, 1952
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1953, and not as part of the United States Cotton Standards Act which comprises this chapter.
